rationale: Issue split from DRIVERS-2658 Improvement; adds hint to distinct and syncs new spec tests.
Issue split + Improvement: renaming error code enum value per spec update; proactive rollout, driver not previously wrong.
Issue split + Improvement: backporting change stream >16MB event handling; proactive spec rollout.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1560; implementing and enabling KMS TLS peer-certificate verification prose tests.
Issue split from DRIVERS-3097; improving JSON spec tests for Binary Vector Subtype, not fixing driver behavior.
cursor rewind() calls clear() on emptyGetMore object that lacks the method; implementation bug, no spec rule contradicted.
SizedMessageTransform fails to handle multi-message TCP chunks causing find() stalls; implementation bug, no spec rule.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2822 Improvement; adds sort to updateOne/replaceOne and syncs spec tests.
Removing top-level awaits from BSON for bundler compatibility; build/packaging issue, no spec behavior.
Restoring keepAliveInitialDelay as a configurable option; API ergonomics, not a spec conformance issue.
Node.js event-ordering race causes socket errors to bypass MongoNetworkError conversion; node-specific timing bug.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2830 Bug; implementing prose test for FaaS+container metadata; test infrastructure work.
Node-specific ignoreUndefined option causes data loss in updateOne; not a standard spec requirement violation.
MongoClient.close() does not terminate in-flight connections; resource lifecycle bug, no spec rule violated.
Internal refactor migrating OIDC machine workflows to automated callbacks; no spec behavior change.
Missing wallTime TypeScript type on change stream events; typing gap, not a behavioral spec deviation.
Update TypeScript to 5.8 and enable erasableSyntaxOnly; build/tooling change, no spec involvement.
Add FreeBSD support to kerberos module; platform build support, no spec conformance issue.
Defer ClientSession creation until cursor initialization to fix resource leak; implementation fix, no specific spec rule.
Explicitly audits TLS options against common drivers spec and addresses mismatches; unskips previously skipped spec tests.
CMAP spec defines background thread must clean up perished connections; driver skipped cleanup when minPoolSize=0.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2452 Improvement; adds databaseName to command events and syncs logging/monitoring spec tests.
Issue split from DRIVERS-3106 Improvement; syncing auto-encryption spec tests and adding UTR support.
Accept in-memory TLS buffers in AutoEncryptionTlsOptions; API enhancement, not a spec conformance issue.
Bump prebuild-install version to fix kerberos NAPI build error; dependency/packaging bug, no spec involvement.
Remove wrapper operation classes to eliminate duplicate server selection calls; internal refactor, no spec behavior change.
Normalize shlwapi.lib casing for case-sensitive Windows build systems; build fix, no spec involvement.
Issue split from DRIVERS-3009 Improvement; syncing spec tests for findOne batchSize behavior clarification.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1447 Improvement; syncing CRUD spec tests for findOne singleBatch/killCursors behavior.
Add @deprecated JSDoc tag to BSON binary subtype 2; documentation/API annotation, no behavioral spec deviation.
POC investigation for shipping ES module driver bundle; build/packaging research, no spec conformance issue.
tryNext does not call _processChange so resumeToken never updates; change streams spec requires token updated on each event.
Wire version determined from server description not connection in load balancer mode; implementation fix, no specific spec rule cited.
ServerSelectionError not treated as resumable error; mentions PyMongo works correctly; change stream spec defines resumable errors.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1340 Improvement; syncing CRUD spec tests for hint+unacknowledged writes on OP_MSG.
tryNext() does not update resumeToken causing stream restart from stale token; change streams spec requires proper token tracking.
Deprecate unused retryWrites on CommandOperationOptions TypeScript type; API ergonomics cleanup, no spec violation.
Issue split + Bug from DRIVERS-3207: custom AWS credential provider not used before other mechanisms per auth-aws spec.
Fix typo in MongoErrorLabel enum PoolRequstedRetry -> PoolRequestedRetry; naming correction, no spec violation.
Throw MongoRuntimeError instead of MongoMissingDependencyError in crypto connection; internal error type fix, no spec rule.
Vector search index creation missing type field in n8n integration; third-party integration documentation issue.
Wrap FLE binding errors as MongoError subclasses; internal error hierarchy fix, no spec rule violated.
Improve TypeScript typing for autoEncryption options to reduce confusion; API ergonomics, no spec violation.
Driver throws on aggregate+explain+writeConcern but server succeeds; over-strict client validation, no spec rule cited.
Sessions prose tests 18/19 require endSessions not sent to non-session servers; driver violated this by always sending.
Switch to bigint literal syntax in BSON; internal code modernization, breaking platform requirement change, no spec behavior.
Remove dynamic crypto import from BSON package; bundler compatibility improvement, no spec behavior change.
Remove default batchSize=1000; behavioral improvement letting server tune it, but no specific spec rule forbids this default.
Remove Transform behavior from AbstractCursor.stream; API cleanup/breaking change, no spec rule violated.
Stop silently filtering unknown change stream stage options; API ergonomics/usability improvement, no spec rule violated.
